personal.name: Sheraz Tariq
personal.title: AI/ML Engineer · Generative AI, Agentic AI & RAG · Full Stack AI Developer
personal.tagline: I turn LLMs from chat experiments into scalable, enterprise-grade AI products — the robust backends that power them and the full-stack apps that make them accessible.
personal.bio: AI/ML Engineer with strong experience building intelligent systems that solve real-world problems — machine learning, deep learning, NLP, and computer vision — with a current focus on Generative AI, multi-agent systems, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). I architect production LLM pipelines and the full-stack applications on top of them, taking models from prototype to scalable, enterprise-grade product.

current.institution: FAST - National University of Computer and Emerging Sciences (NUCES)

achievements: Architected ngedu.ai — an AI-powered homeschooling platform delivering the Australian Curriculum (Year 0–12)
Designed multi-agent LLM systems (tutor, classroom, daily coach, parent advisor) and real-time voice tutoring
Built production RAG pipelines and 70+ serverless edge functions powering enterprise-grade AI features
Integrated Generative AI into enterprise CRM platforms (SugarCRM, SuiteCRM) via a LangGraph multi-agent assistant

experience.description: Architected and lead NextGen Schooling (ngedu.ai), an AI-powered homeschooling platform delivering the Australian Curriculum from Year 0 to Year 12. Designed multiple coordinated LLM agents — an AI tutor, classroom agent, daily coach, and parent advisor — plus real-time voice tutoring built on AWS Nova Sonic streaming (with barge-in) and Amazon Polly TTS. Built the full-stack product with React, TypeScript, Tailwind, and Supabase (Postgres/pgvector), including 70+ serverless edge functions, Stripe subscription billing, and role-based portals. Own production concerns end to end: AWS (Bedrock, S3, Lambda), performance budgets, SEO/GEO, and end-to-end and load testing.

Engineered and maintained critical features for the enterprise CRM platforms SugarCRM and SuiteCRM. Built "talkerCRM", a LangGraph-based multi-agent assistant that integrates Generative AI into everyday CRM workflows. Focused on scalable backend development and clean architecture across the full software development lifecycle.

cloud_data: AWS (Bedrock, Titan, Nova Sonic, Polly, S3, Lambda)

projects.title: NextGen Schooling — ngedu.ai
projects.description: Flagship AI-powered K–12 homeschooling platform delivering the Australian Curriculum from Year 0 to Year 12. Architected and lead end to end: multiple coordinated LLM agents (AI tutor, classroom agent, daily coach, parent advisor), real-time voice tutoring with AWS Nova Sonic streaming (barge-in) + Amazon Polly TTS, and RAG-based curriculum content generation. Ships role-based portals for students, parents, facilitators, and admins, Stripe subscription billing, and 70+ serverless edge functions in production.

projects.title: NextGen RAG Engine — ngedu.ai Backend
projects.description: The production RAG engine behind ngedu.ai. A FastAPI service that ingests curriculum syllabi (PDF/DOCX), embeds them with Amazon Titan Text Embeddings V2 into Supabase pgvector, and generates curriculum-aligned readings, quizzes, and slides using Claude 3.5 Sonnet on AWS Bedrock. Engineered for retrieval quality — hybrid search (BM25 sparse + dense vectors) with reranking, query expansion, and a semantic query cache, plus grade-aware content validation and deduplication. Deployed on AWS App Runner.

projects.title: DocChat-MultiAgent
projects.description: A multi-agent RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) system powered by Google Gemini, Docling, and LangGraph for intelligent document Q&A with built-in fact-checking and hallucination prevention.

projects.title: AI-Nutrition-Coach-via-Multi-Agent
projects.description: Built and deployed a multi-agent system that powers intelligent decision-making, integrating multimodal AI to handle both visual and textual data. Wrapped in a friendly Gradio interface so the coaching experience is accessible to anyone.

projects.title: Meal & Grocery Planner with CrewAI
projects.description: A production-ready intelligent meal planning and grocery shopping assistant powered by CrewAI, LangChain, and Google Gemini. Uses a multi-agent architecture to coordinate specialized AI agents for meal research, shopping organization, budget analysis, and waste reduction.

projects.title: Food Recommendation System via RAG
projects.description: An intelligent food recommendation system leveraging RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) and vector similarity search. Integrated the Google Gemini API to improve recommendation accuracy and deliver personalized suggestions, built on a scalable architecture for real-time recommendations.

projects.title: AI Icebreaker Bot
projects.description: Executed the complete RAG workflow from data extraction to intelligent generation. Used LangChain and LlamaIndex for efficient processing and retrieval, creating an engaging, context-aware icebreaker conversation bot for natural conversations.

projects.title: YouTube Summarizer
projects.description: A question-answering (QA) tool that extracts and summarizes information from YouTube videos. Leveraging LangChain and an LLM, it answers specific questions grounded in a video's transcript.

projects.title: Community Automation System Using Blockchain
projects.description: A community automation web application that leverages blockchain technology and AI to streamline community operations, with advanced user-interaction features and decentralized infrastructure for transparent community management.

internship.availability: Open to select AI/ML roles and collaborations
internship.workStyle: Production-first engineer who takes LLMs from prototype to scalable, enterprise-grade product — owning both the AI pipelines and the full-stack apps on top of them
internship.goals: Partner with teams building ambitious Generative AI and agentic products, where I can architect robust LLM systems and the applications that make them accessible to real users.

funFacts: Architected and lead a live AI homeschooling platform (ngedu.ai) serving the Australian Curriculum
Shipped real-time voice tutoring with AWS Nova Sonic streaming and barge-in
Builds production multi-agent systems and RAG pipelines, not just framework demos
Comfortable across the full stack — from LLM pipelines to React front-ends and cloud infra
personality.workingStyle: I focus on building scalable, production-grade AI systems with attention to performance, reliability, and real user impact
personality.motivation: Turning cutting-edge LLMs into dependable, enterprise-grade products that solve real-world problems
